## Description

What infrastructure, CI/CD, or config does this change? Summarise the change.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read `docs/contributors/quality-bar.md`.
- [ ] Changes to workflows were tested with `act` or a dry-run branch.
- [ ] Secrets are referenced via GitHub Actions secrets — no hardcoded tokens.
- [ ] `npm run validate:references` passes (if docs/workflows/infra affected).
- [ ] **Allow edits from maintainers** enabled.
